vocab.meaning: mang tính thực dụng (chỉ chú trọng công năng)
vocab.example: My morning bag is strictly utilitarian, packed with everything from chargers to lunch boxes.
I look for versatility in my evening accessories so they can transition from a business meeting to a dinner party.

vocab.meaning: tối giản, sắp xếp cho gọn nhẹ và hiệu quả hơn
vocab.example: When the sun goes down, I streamline my belongings to the bare essentials like my keys and phone.

vocab.meaning: guồng quay công việc hàng ngày (vất vả, lặp đi lặp lại)
vocab.example: Everything I carry at 8 AM is geared toward surviving the daily grind at the office.

vocab.meaning: cồng kềnh, chiếm nhiều diện tích
vocab.example: I swap my bulky laptop bag for a sleek clutch when I go out in the evening.
My choice of what to carry in the evening is dictated more by my aesthetic preference than by necessity.

vocab.meaning: một sự tương phản hoàn toàn/rõ rệt
vocab.example: The heavy backpack I lug around in the morning stands in stark contrast to the small pouch I use at night.

vocab.meaning: bị đè nặng bởi, phải gánh vác
vocab.example: I hate being burdened with unnecessary paperwork when I'm trying to relax in the evening.
I prefer compact items for my evening outings so I can move around the city more freely.

vocab.meaning: chỉ những thứ thực sự thiết yếu
vocab.example: During the day I carry a lot of 'just in case' items, but at night it’s definitely essentials only.
